title: Impulse Gun
description: This is a mod which allows you to either pull or push yourself with a new tool, depending on which hand the item is in!
body:
This is a mod which allows you to either pull or push yourself with a new tool, depending on which hand the item is in! You.

Putting it in your main hand lets you pull yourself towards your eye target

Putting it in your off hand lets you push yourself away from your eye target.
